data.body: Unit tests for: (1) forwardTransitionTarget() across all states and profiles. (2) nextBeat()/claimBeat() happy path + error cases. (3) BeadsBackend.buildTakePrompt() claim flow. (4) BeadsBackend.buildPollPrompt(). (5) advanceGuarded() dispatch. (6) Knots regression: all existing tests pass unchanged.
data.title: Phase 8: Tests for beads workflow integration
